title: AN ACT AUTHORIZING THE SUM OF ONE MILLION ONE HUNDRED SIXTY-FIVE THOUSAND PESOS FOR BREEDING STATIONS IN THE PHILIPPINES.

chunks.text:
H. No. 1902 / 57 OG No. 51, 9161 (December 18, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3097, June 17, 1961 ]

AN ACT AUTHORIZING THE SUM OF ONE MILLION ONE HUNDRED SIXTY-FIVE THOUSAND PESOS FOR BREEDING STATIONS IN THE PHILIPPINES.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Out of any funds in the National Treasury not otherwise appropriated, the sum of one million one hundred sixty-five thousand pesos is hereby authorized for the establishment and improvement of animal breeding stations in the Philippines, said sum to be apportioned as follows:

1. Animal Breeding Station, Uigan City

P50,000.00

2. Animal Breeding Station, Gattaran, Cagayan

50,000.00

3.Animal Breeding Station, Balamban, Cebu

50,000.00

4.Animal Breeding Station, Bago Oshiro, Davao City

50,000.00

5.Animal Breeding Station, General Santos , Cotabato

50,000.00

6.Animal Breeding Station , Murcia , Negros Occidental

50,000.00

7.Animal Breeding Station, Rizal, Zam- boanga del Norte

50,000,00

8.Improvements for the Ilocos Sur Animal Breeding Center , Santa Maria , Ilocos Sur

15,000.00

9.Animal Breeding Station, Magalang, Pampanga

50,000.00

10.Animal Breeding Station, San Ilde- fonso, Bulacan

50,000.00

11.Animal Breeding Station Las Navas, Samar

50,000.00

12.Animal Breeding Station, Laongan, Pambujan, Samar

50,000.00

13.Animal Breeding Station, Can-avid, Samar

50,000.00

14.Animal Breeding Station, Kabayan, Benguet, Mt. Province

50,000.00

50,000.00

13.Animal Breeding Station, Can-avid, Samar

50,000.00

14.Animal Breeding Station, Kabayan, Benguet, Mt. Province

50,000.00

15.Animal Breeding Station, Tabuk, Kalinga, Mt. Province

50,000.00

16.Animal Breeding Station, San Jose , Negros Oriental

50,000.00

17.Animal Breeding Station, Siaton Negros Oriental

50,000.00

18.Animal Breeding Station, Argao, Cebu

50,000.00

19.Animal Breeding Station, Cabagan, Isabela

50,000.00

20.Animal Breeding Station, Lambunao, Iloilo

50,000.00

21.Animal Breeding Station, Nuling, Cota- bato

50,000.00

22.Animal Breeding Station, Villaba and Tabango, Leyte

50,000.00

23.Animal Breeding Station, Trece Mar- tires City, Cavite

50,000.00

24.Animal Breeding Station, San Pascual,Masbate

50,000.00

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 17, 1961.
